name: manage_mailing_lists
description: Create, update, delete, and list mailing lists on your Mailgun account. You can also add, remove, and list members of a mailing list. Mailing lists allow you to send to a group of recipients using a single list address (e.g., team@lists.example.com) instead of specifying each recipient individually.
note: This capability covers multiple sub-endpoints for managing lists and their members.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: The mailing list address (e.g., 'team@lists.example.com'). Used for creating a new list (POST) or identifying an existing list.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: A human-readable name for the mailing list.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description of the mailing list's purpose.

parameters.name: access_level
parameters.description: Who can post to the list. Options: 'readonly' (only via API), 'members' (list members), 'everyone'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per page when listing. Default 100.

sub_endpoints.description: Get details of a specific mailing list
List members of a mailing list
Add a member to a mailing list
Remove a member from a mailing list
